prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of a futuristic street warrior standing in the center of a narrow neon-lit alley at night in a rain-soaked Asian megacity. Medium close-up framing from the chest up, subject facing forward, with the face partially obscured by a large centered rectangular censor block in muted teal-green. The character has messy glowing bright cyan hair, a visible cybernetic right eye area with metallic facial implants, cables and mechanical details around the neck and jaw, and a rugged high-tech armored jacket with straps, buckles, tubes, segmented plating, and luminous cyan and orange light accents. Use a dramatic teal-and-orange color palette, glossy wet pavement reflections, soft rain in the air, dense atmospheric haze, and heavy bokeh from neon signage in the background. The alley should contain 8 visible glowing sign clusters, mostly vertical and horizontal signs with Chinese characters, plus futuristic storefront lights and industrial wall details. Make the mood gritty, stylish, dystopian, and ultra-detailed, with sharp focus on the subject and a blurred background, as if from a high-end sci-fi film still.
